name: Apple Strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a large bowl, mix together butter, sugar, lemon rind, and confectioners sugar until well combined.
3. Gradually add flour and stir until dough forms.
4. Cover and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes.
5. Roll out dough on a floured surface to desired thickness.
6. Cut into strips using a sharp knife.
7. Place strips onto a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
8. Brush each strip with egg wash.
9. Bake in preheated oven until golden brown, about 20-25 minutes.
10. Turn off and remove from the oven. Allow to cool completely before serving.
